heading: Authority of officers of Congress over Congressional employees
label: 4101 Authority of officers of Congress over Congressional employees

children.heading: Qualifications determinations; removal and discipline
children.label: a Qualifications determinations; removal and discipline

children.text: to determine, before the appointment of any individual as an employee under the supervision of that officer of the Congress, whether that individual possesses the qualifications necessary for the satisfactory performance of the duties and responsibilities to be assigned to him; and
to remove or otherwise discipline any employee under his supervision.
an elected officer of the Senate or House of Representatives who is not a Member of the Senate or House; and
